kirundi.skip_count_overlay_column_of_running_t: Urwego rwo kubara usimbuka (inkingi y'imibare iteranya igenda)
kirundi.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Utudomo tumwe, twahinduwe gusa ku ruhande. Wiga ukuri kumwe, umenya kabiri.
kirundi.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Iyi ni imwe mu kuri 15 gukomeye — itsinda rito risaba kwiga ku mutwe by'ukuri. Jya mu buryo bwo Kwitoza → «15 Bikomeye» kugira ngo ubyitoze.
kirundi.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Imibare imwe, mu maso ane. Kumenya ukuri kumwe biguha ibindi.
kirundi.9s_digits_sum_to_9: Mu mibare ya 9, imibare iteranya ni 9
kirundi.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Hitamo ishusho yo kugaragaza. Imbonerahamwe yuzuyemo imiterere: igihe uyibonye, kimwe cya kabiri cy'ukuri kiba gihanurwa.
kirundi.multiplication_table_with_pattern_high: Imbonerahamwe yo kugwiza ifite kugaragaza ishusho
kirundi.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Kanda ishusho iyo ari yo yose hejuru kugira ngo umurikire utuyobora kandi usome amategeko. Amashusho menshi ashobora kwisumbirana (urugero, 5×5 ni «umugwizo wa 5» kandi «kare yuzuye»).
kirundi.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Impamvu amashusho aruta kwiga ku mutwe ku gahato
kirundi.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Ukeneye kwiga ku mutwe gusa hafi kimwe cya gatatu cy'imbonerahamwe.
kirundi.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Ikintu cyose kiri mu nkingi za 1, 2, 5, 10 na 11 gifite itegeko ryoroshye. Kare ni itsinda rito (ukuri 12). Ibisigaye ni «hagati hakomeye» — hafi ukuri 15 — gusaba kwiga ku mutwe by'ukuri: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 n'impanga zabyo.
kirundi.distributive_shortcut_for_the_tricky_m: Inzira ngufi y'ikwirakwiza ku hagati hakomeye.
kirundi.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Wibagiwe 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ubaka ukuri gukomeye uhereye ku byoroshye bibiri. Nyuma yo gusubiramo bihagije, igisubizo kiba cyikora.
kirundi.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Kwerekana buri kuri nk'urukiramende rw'icyitegererezo cy'ubuso (igika cy'Ishusho) cyangwa nk'ishusho (iki gika) bikuha inzira igana ku gisubizo itagomba kwibuka byikoresha. Kwibuka kubakwa mu gihe, ariko ntibibaho gusa binyuze mu myitozo ya tekiniki.
kirundi.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Buri kayanga = ukuri kumwe ko kugwiza. Ibara = ubuhanga bwawe kugeza ubu. Kanda ku kayanga iyo ari ko kose kugira ngo witoze uko kuri.
kirundi.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Umuryango w'ukuri — imibare imwe, mu maso ane
kirundi.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Utugende tw'urwego rw'ubuhanga n'umubare-shingiro watoranyijwe. Igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Igitekerezo: urwego ruhindura gute inama ku banyeshuri bahanganira?
kirundi.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Bite niba ubuhanga = 100%? Ni iki gishimirwa?
kirundi.how_does_color_coding_affect_motivatio: Gukoresha amabara bigira ingaruka ki ku kwishimira?
kirundi.explain_mastery_learning_thresholds: Sobanura inzego z'kwiga gushingiye ku buhanga.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'ubuhanga gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3; nta manota mabisi; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
